product.title: Lounge Café
product.description: Lounge Café is an atmospheric coffee shop simulator where you play as Sara, a girl from Lucerne who moves to the coffee-centric city of Binoville in eastern Switzerland. After purchasing a small café, Sara begins her journey as a barista – choosing beans, selecting ingredients, crafting drinks, and trying to turn her place into the best spot in the city. One day, she is visited by a representative from a well-known organization who invites her to participate in a large citywide competition between cafés. The competition lasts for several months, and the main goal is to gain enough reputation and win the grand prize — proving that Sara's café truly deserves the title of the best in the entire city.

features.feature: Semi-realistic coffee brewing mechanics: choose beans, milk, syrups, and spices
Atmospheric café simulator set in the fictional Swiss city of Binoville
Story-driven narrative with unique characters and a citywide competition
Manage prices, balance expenses, and react to market changes
13 explorable districts of Binoville (coming in updates)

additional.title: Free Prologue
additional.description: A free story-driven prequel is available on Steam — play as Christian, a retiring café owner, before the events of the main game.

credit.role: Narrative Design, Music Composition, Game Concept, UI
